inputs.label: Scale Length
inputs.businessContext: The vibrating length of the string from nut to bridge, typically 0.33 m for a full-size violin.

businessContext_i18n.en: The vibrating length of the string from nut to bridge, typically 0.33 m for a full-size violin.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Titreşen tel uzunluğu (somundan köprüye), tipik olarak tam boy bir keman için 0,33 m.

inputs.label: Desired Pitch Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Frequency of the desired pitch, e.g., A4 = 440 Hz.

businessContext_i18n.en: Frequency of the desired pitch, e.g., A4 = 440 Hz.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen perdenin frekansı, örn. A4 = 440 Hz.

inputs.label: String Diameter
inputs.businessContext: Diameter of the string, e.g., 0.5 mm = 0.0005 m.

businessContext_i18n.en: Diameter of the string, e.g., 0.5 mm = 0.0005 m.

inputs.label: Material Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the string material, e.g., gut ~1000 kg/m³, steel ~7800 kg/m³.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the string material, e.g., gut ~1000 kg/m³, steel ~7800 kg/m³.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tel malzemesinin yoğunluğu, örn. bağırsak ~1000 kg/m³, çelik ~7800 kg/m³.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
